sentences.sentence: Bondi Beach, Australia's most famous beach, is located in the suburb of Bondi, in the Local Government Area of Waverley, seven kilometers from the centre of Sydney.
sentences.translation: 邦迪海滩是澳大利亚最著名的海滩，位于邦迪郊区，隶属韦弗利地方政府辖区，距悉尼市中心七公里。

structure.text: in the suburb of Bondi, in the Local Government Area of Waverley
seven kilometers from the centre of Sydney

difficult_points: Australia's most famous beach 是同位语，补充说明 Bondi Beach。
is located 使用被动形式表达地理位置，后接两个层层细化地点的介词短语。

sentences.sentence: "Bondi" or"Boondi" is an Aboriginal word meaning water breaking over rocks or the sound of breaking waves.
sentences.translation: “Bondi”或“Boondi”是一个原住民词语，意为水冲过岩石，或碎浪发出的声音。

structure.text: meaning water breaking over rocks or the sound of breaking waves

difficult_points: meaning... 是现在分词短语，后置解释 Aboriginal word 的含义。
water breaking over rocks 与 the sound of breaking waves 由 or 连接，表示两种释义。

sentences.sentence: The Australian Museum records that Bondi means a place where a flight of nullas took place.
sentences.translation: 澳大利亚博物馆记载，Bondi 意指一个曾发生投掷棍飞掷活动的地方。

structure.text: that Bondi means a place where a flight of nullas took place
where a flight of nullas took place

difficult_points: that 引导 records 的宾语从句，说明博物馆的具体记载。
where 引导定语从句修饰 a place，took place 表示“发生”。

sentences.sentence: There are Aboriginal Rock carving on the northern end of the beach at Ben Buckler and south of Bondi Beach near McKenzies Beach on the coastal walk.
sentences.translation: 海滩北端的本·巴克勒以及邦迪海滩以南、麦肯齐斯海滩附近的滨海步道上，都有原住民岩刻。

structure.text: on the northern end of the beach at Ben Buckler
and south of Bondi Beach near McKenzies Beach on the coastal walk

difficult_points: There are 是存在句结构，真正说明存在事物的是 Aboriginal Rock carving。
and 连接两处地点，第二处由 south of、near 和 on 三个位置成分共同限定。

sentences.sentence: The indigenous people of the area at the time of European settlement have generally been welcomed to as the Sydney people or the Eora (Eora means "the people").
sentences.translation: 欧洲人定居时期，这一地区的原住民通常被称为悉尼人或 Eora 人（Eora 意为“人们”）。

structure.text: The indigenous people of the area at the time of European settlement
have generally been welcomed to as
the Sydney people or the Eora

difficult_points: at the time of European settlement 是时间状语，限定所说的历史时期。
括号中的独立分句解释 Eora 一词的含义；原文谓语搭配虽不自然但需按原文理解。

sentences.sentence: One theory describes the Eora as a sub-group of the Darug language group which occupied the Cumberland Plain west to the Blue Mountains.
sentences.translation: 一种理论认为，Eora 是达鲁格语群的一个分支；该语群分布在坎伯兰平原，向西延伸至蓝山。

structure.text: describes the Eora as a sub-group of the Darug language group
which occupied the Cumberland Plain west to the Blue Mountains

difficult_points: describe A as B 表示“把 A 描述为 B”或“认为 A 是 B”。
which 引导定语从句，先行词是 the Darug language group，说明其分布范围。

sentences.sentence: However, another theory suggests that they were a distinct language group of their own.
sentences.translation: 然而，另一种理论认为，他们本身就是一个独立的语言群体。

structure.text: that they were a distinct language group of their own

difficult_points: However 是连接副词，表示本句观点与上一种理论相对。
that 引导 suggests 的宾语从句，they 回指 Eora 人。

expressions.meaning_zh: 他们自身的；独立拥有的

sentences.sentence: There is no clear evidence for the name or names of the particular band(s) of the Eora that roamed what is now the Waverley area.
sentences.translation: 对于曾活动于如今韦弗利地区的 Eora 特定群体究竟叫什么，目前没有明确证据。

structure.text: for the name or names of the particular band(s) of the Eora
that roamed what is now the Waverley area
what is now the Waverley area

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 the particular band(s) of the Eora。
what is now the Waverley area 是融合关系从句，整体作 roamed 的宾语，意为“如今的韦弗利地区”。

sentences.sentence: A number of place names within Waverley, most famously Bondi, have been based on words derived from Aboriginal languages of the Sydney region.
sentences.translation: 韦弗利境内的一些地名——其中最著名的是 Bondi——源自悉尼地区原住民语言中的词汇。

structure.text: A number of place names within Waverley
words derived from Aboriginal languages of the Sydney region
derived from Aboriginal languages of the Sydney region

difficult_points: most famously Bondi 是插入语，举出最知名的地名实例。
derived from... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 words。

sentences.sentence: From the mid-1800s Bondi Beach was a favourite location for family outings and picnics.
sentences.translation: 从19世纪中叶起，邦迪海滩便成为家庭出游和野餐的热门地点。

structure.text: a favourite location for family outings and picnics

difficult_points: From the mid-1800s 表示状态开始的时间，即从19世纪中叶起。
for family outings and picnics 说明该地点所适合的活动。

sentences.sentence: The beginnings of the suburb go back to 1809, when the early road builder, William Roberts, received from Governor Bligh a grant of 81 hectares of what is now most of the business and residential area of Bondi Beach.
sentences.translation: 这片郊区的起源可追溯到1809年，当时早期道路建设者威廉·罗伯茨从布莱总督那里获赠81公顷土地，如今邦迪海滩大部分商业和住宅区都位于其上。

structure.text: when the early road builder, William Roberts, received from Governor Bligh a grant of 81 hectares of what is now most of the business and residential area of Bondi Beach
what is now most of the business and residential area of Bondi Beach

difficult_points: when 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 1809 年发生的事件。
what is now... 是融合关系从句，作 of 的宾语，指如今已成为邦迪海滩主要商业和住宅区的土地。

sentences.sentence: In 1851, Edward Smith Hall and Francis O'Brien purchased 200 acres of the Bondi area that embraced almost the whole frontage of Bondi Beach, and it was named the "The Bondi Estate."
sentences.translation: 1851年，爱德华·史密斯·霍尔和弗朗西斯·奥布莱恩买下邦迪地区200英亩土地，几乎涵盖邦迪海滩整段临海地带；这片土地被命名为“The Bondi Estate”。

structure.text: Edward Smith Hall and Francis O'Brien
purchased 200 acres of the Bondi area
that embraced almost the whole frontage of Bondi Beach
and it was named the "The Bondi Estate."

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 the Bondi area，说明购地所涵盖的范围。
and 后是被动结构，it 指代所购土地；句末句点位于引号内部。

sentences.sentence: Between 1855 and 1877 O'Brien purchased Hall's share of the land, renamed the land the "O'Brien Estate," and made the beach and the surrounding land available to the public as a picnic ground and amusement resort.
sentences.translation: 1855年至1877年间，奥布莱恩买下霍尔所持的土地份额，把土地改名为“O'Brien Estate”，并将海滩及周边土地作为野餐地和游乐胜地向公众开放。

structure.text: purchased Hall's share of the land
and made the beach and the surrounding land available to the public as a picnic ground and amusement resort

difficult_points: purchased、renamed 和 made 是三个共用主语 O'Brien 的并列谓语。
make A available to B 表示“使 A 可供 B 使用”，as 后说明土地开放后的用途。

sentences.sentence: As the beach became increasingly popular, O'Brien threatened to stop public beach access.
sentences.translation: 随着海滩日益受欢迎，奥布莱恩威胁要停止公众进入海滩。

structure.text: As the beach became increasingly popular

difficult_points: As 引导伴随变化的时间状语从句，意为“随着……”。
threaten to do 表示“威胁要做某事”，不定式说明威胁的具体行动。

sentences.sentence: However, the Municipal Council believed that the Government needed to intervene to make the beach a public reserve.
sentences.translation: 然而，市议会认为政府需要介入，将海滩划为公共保留地。

structure.text: that the Government needed to intervene to make the beach a public reserve
to make the beach a public reserve

difficult_points: that 引导 believed 的宾语从句，说明市议会的主张。
to intervene 表示需要采取的行动，后一个不定式 to make... 表示介入的目的。

sentences.sentence: During the 1900s beach became associated with health, leisure and democracy – a playground everyone could enjoy equally.
sentences.translation: 20世纪期间，海滩开始与健康、休闲和民主联系在一起，成为人人都能平等享受的游乐场。

structure.text: became associated with health, leisure and democracy
a playground everyone could enjoy equally

difficult_points: 破折号后的 a playground 是同位语，对海滩所代表的理念作进一步解释。
everyone could enjoy equally 是省略关系代词 that 的定语从句，修饰 a playground。

sentences.sentence: Bondi Beach was a working-class suburb throughout most of the twentieth century with migrant people from New Zealand comprising the majority of the local population.
sentences.translation: 在20世纪的大部分时间里，邦迪海滩是一个工人阶级郊区，其中新西兰移民占当地人口的大多数。

structure.text: throughout most of the twentieth century
with migrant people from New Zealand comprising the majority of the local population

difficult_points: throughout most of... 表示该状态贯穿20世纪的大部分时期。
with + 名词 + 现在分词构成独立结构，补充说明当地人口构成。

sentences.sentence: The first tramway reached the beach in 1884.
sentences.translation: 第一条有轨电车线路于1884年通达海滩。
difficult_points: reach 是及物动词，后面直接接地点 the beach，不需要介词。
in 1884 是时间状语，说明有轨电车线路通达海滩的年份。

sentences.sentence: Following this, tram became the first public transportation in Bondi.
sentences.translation: 此后，有轨电车成为邦迪的第一种公共交通方式。

structure.text: the first public transportation in Bondi

difficult_points: Following this 是句首衔接成分，this 指上一句有轨电车抵达海滩一事。
became 是系动词，后面的名词短语作主语补足语。

sentences.sentence: As an alternative, this action changed the rule that only rich people can enjoy the beach.
sentences.translation: 作为一种替代选择，这一举措改变了只有富人才能享受海滩的规则。

structure.text: the rule that only rich people can enjoy the beach
that only rich people can enjoy the beach

difficult_points: this action 回指引入有轨电车公共交通这一举措。
that 引导同位语从句，具体说明 the rule 的内容，而不是修饰某个人或物。

sentences.sentence: By the 1930s Bondi was drawing not only local visitors but also people from elsewhere in Australia and overseas.
sentences.translation: 到20世纪30年代，邦迪吸引的不仅有本地游客，还有来自澳大利亚其他地区和海外的人们。

structure.text: not only local visitors but also people from elsewhere in Australia and overseas

difficult_points: By the 1930s 表示“到20世纪30年代时”，强调发展到该时期的结果。
not only... but also... 连接两类并列宾语，突出游客来源范围扩大。

sentences.sentence: Advertising at the time referred to Bondi Beach as the "Playground of the Pacific".
sentences.translation: 当时的广告把邦迪海滩称为“太平洋的游乐场”。
difficult_points: at the time 后置修饰 Advertising，限定为当时的宣传内容。
refer to A as B 表示“把 A 称作 B”。

sentences.sentence: There is a growing trend that people prefer having to relax near seaside instead of living unhealthily in cities.
sentences.translation: 人们越来越倾向于到海边放松，而不是在城市中过着不健康的生活。

structure.text: that people prefer having to relax near seaside instead of living unhealthily in cities
instead of living unhealthily in cities

difficult_points: that 引导同位语从句，说明 a growing trend 的具体内容。
instead of 后接动名词 living，与前面所偏好的放松方式形成对比；原文 prefer having to relax 搭配不自然但语义可由上下文确定。

sentences.sentence: The increasing popularity of sea bathing during the late 1800s and early 1900s raised concerns about public safety and how to prevent people from drowning.
sentences.translation: 19世纪末至20世纪初，海水浴日益流行，引发了人们对公共安全以及如何防止溺水的担忧。

structure.text: The increasing popularity of sea bathing during the late 1800s and early 1900s
public safety and how to prevent people from drowning
how to prevent people from drowning

difficult_points: 句子主语中心词是 popularity，of sea bathing 和时间成分都对其作限定。
how to prevent... 是“疑问词 + 不定式”结构，与 public safety 并列作 about 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: In response, the world's first formally documented surf lifesaving club, the Bondi Surf Bathers'Life Saving Club, was formed in 1907.
sentences.translation: 作为回应，世界上首个有正式记录的冲浪救生俱乐部——邦迪冲浪浴者救生俱乐部——于1907年成立。

structure.text: the world's first formally documented surf lifesaving club
the Bondi Surf Bathers'Life Saving Club

difficult_points: the Bondi Surf Bathers'Life Saving Club 是同位语，给出该俱乐部的名称。
was formed 是一般过去时的被动语态，表示该组织于1907年成立。

sentences.sentence: This was powerfully reinforced by the dramatic events of "Black Sunday" at Bondi in 1938.
sentences.translation: 1938年邦迪“黑色星期日”的戏剧性事件有力地强化了这一形象。

structure.text: by the dramatic events of "Black Sunday"

difficult_points: This 指代前文所建立的冲浪救生及救生员的重要形象。
was reinforced 是被动语态，by 短语指出强化这一形象的事件。

sentences.sentence: Some 35,000 people were on the beach and a large group of lifesavers were about to start a surf race when three freak waves hit the beach, sweeping hundreds of people out to sea.
sentences.translation: 当时约有3.5万人在海滩上，一大群救生员正准备开始冲浪比赛，突然三股异常巨浪袭上海滩，把数百人卷入海中。

structure.text: Some 35,000 people were on the beach
and a large group of lifesavers were about to start a surf race
when three freak waves hit the beach
sweeping hundreds of people out to sea

difficult_points: be about to do... when... 表示“正要做某事，突然发生另一件事”。
sweeping... 是结果性的现在分词短语，说明巨浪袭击后造成的后果。

sentences.sentence: Lifesavers rescued 300 people.
sentences.translation: 救生员救出了300人。
difficult_points: rescued 是一般过去时，叙述当时已经完成的救援行动。
Lifesavers 与上一句 a large group of lifesavers 相呼应，保持叙事主体连续。

sentences.sentence: The largest mass rescue in the history of surf bathing, it confirmed the place of the lifesaver in the national imagination.
sentences.translation: 作为冲浪海浴史上规模最大的集体救援，这一事件确立了救生员在国民集体想象中的地位。

structure.text: The largest mass rescue in the history of surf bathing
the place of the lifesaver in the national imagination

difficult_points: 句首名词短语先点明事件性质，随后 it 回指这次大规模救援。
confirm the place of... 表示巩固或确立某事物在特定观念体系中的地位。

sentences.sentence: Bondi Beach is the endpoint of the City to Surf Fun Run which is held each year in August.
sentences.translation: 邦迪海滩是“城市到海滩”趣味跑的终点，这项活动每年八月举行。

structure.text: the endpoint of the City to Surf Fun Run
which is held each year in August

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，先行词是 the City to Surf Fun Run。
is held 是被动语态，说明这项跑步活动每年的举办时间。

sentences.sentence: Australian surf carnivals further instilled this image.
sentences.translation: 澳大利亚的冲浪嘉年华进一步强化了这一形象。
difficult_points: further 表示在既有基础上“进一步”加强影响。
this image 承接前文邦迪及冲浪救生文化所形成的公共形象。

sentences.sentence: A Royal Surf Carnival was held at Bondi Beach for Queen Elizabeth II during her first visited in Australia in 1954.
sentences.translation: 1954年伊丽莎白二世女王首次访问澳大利亚期间，邦迪海滩为她举办了一场皇家冲浪嘉年华。

structure.text: at Bondi Beach for Queen Elizabeth II
during her first visited in Australia in 1954

difficult_points: was held 是一般过去时的被动语态，for Queen Elizabeth II 说明活动为谁而办。
during 引出时间背景；原文 first visited 形式不合常规，但语义指女王首次访问澳大利亚。

sentences.sentence: Since 1867, there have been over fifty visits by a member of the British Royal Family to Australia.
sentences.translation: 自1867年以来，英国王室成员访问澳大利亚的次数已超过五十次。

structure.text: over fifty visits by a member of the British Royal Family to Australia

difficult_points: Since 1867 与现在完成时 there have been 搭配，表示从过去延续至今的统计。
by a member... 说明访问者，to Australia 说明访问目的地。

sentences.sentence: In addition to many activities, the Bondi Beach Markets is open every Sunday.
sentences.translation: 除众多活动外，邦迪海滩市集每周日也开放。
difficult_points: In addition to 是复合介词，表示在已有活动之外再补充一项。
is open 描述固定开放状态，every Sunday 表示规律性时间。

sentences.sentence: Many wealthy people spend Christmas Day at the beach.
sentences.translation: 许多富裕人士会在海滩度过圣诞节。
difficult_points: spend 后直接接时间 Christmas Day，表示“度过圣诞节”。
at the beach 是地点状语，说明人们在哪里度过这一天。

sentences.sentence: However, the shortage of houses occurs when lots of people crushed to the seaside.
sentences.translation: 然而，当大量人群涌向海滨时，住房短缺便会出现。

structure.text: when lots of people crushed to the seaside

difficult_points: However 表示转折，从海滩活动的吸引力转到其造成的住房问题。
when 引导时间状语从句；原文 crushed 用法不自然，结合语境理解为大量人群涌向海滨。

sentences.sentence: Manly is the seashore town which solved this problem.
sentences.translation: 曼利是解决了这一问题的海滨城镇。
difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，修饰 the seashore town。
this problem 回指上一句提到的人群涌入造成的住房短缺。

sentences.sentence: However, people still choose Bondi as the satisfied destination rather than Manly.
sentences.translation: 然而，人们仍把邦迪而非曼利选作更合意的目的地。

structure.text: still choose Bondi as the satisfied destination

difficult_points: choose A as B 表示“选择 A 作为 B”。
rather than 引出被排除的选择 Manly；原文 satisfied 修饰 destination 不自然，语义为令人满意的目的地。

sentences.sentence: Bondi Beach has a commercial area along Campbell Parade and adjacent side streets, featuring many popular cafes, restaurants, and hotels, with views of the contemporary beach.
sentences.translation: 邦迪海滩沿坎贝尔大道及相邻支路分布着商业区，那里有许多热门咖啡馆、餐厅和酒店，并可眺望现代海滩景观。

structure.text: has a commercial area along Campbell Parade and adjacent side streets
featuring many popular cafes, restaurants, and hotels
with views of the contemporary beach

difficult_points: featuring... 是现在分词短语，补充描述商业区内的设施。
with views of... 进一步说明这些场所具备的景观条件。

sentences.sentence: It is depicted as wholly modern and European.
sentences.translation: 它被描绘成完全现代化且具有欧洲风格的地方。
difficult_points: It 回指前文所描述的邦迪海滩或其商业区。
is depicted as 是被动结构，表示“被描绘为”，后接并列表语。

sentences.sentence: In the last decade, Bondi Beaches' unique position has seen a dramatic rise in svelte houses and apartments to take advantage of the views and scent of the sea.
sentences.translation: 过去十年中，邦迪海滩的独特位置见证了修长雅致的住宅和公寓大幅增加，以充分利用海景与海洋气息。

structure.text: has seen a dramatic rise in svelte houses and apartments
to take advantage of the views and scent of the sea

difficult_points: has seen 是现在完成时，位置被拟人化为“见证”建筑数量的增长。
to take advantage of... 是目的状语，说明兴建这些房屋和公寓的目的。

expressions.text: the views and scent of the sea

sentences.sentence: The valley running down to the beach is the famous world over for its view of distinctive red-tiled roofs.
sentences.translation: 这条一路延伸至海滩的山谷，因可俯瞰别具一格的红瓦屋顶而闻名世界。

structure.text: The valley running down to the beach
for its view of distinctive red-tiled roofs

difficult_points: running down to the beach 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 The valley。
world over 表示“全世界范围内”；原文 the famous 不合常规，但整体语义是“闻名世界”。

sentences.sentence: Those architectures are deeply influenced by British coastal town.
sentences.translation: 那些建筑深受英国沿海城镇风格的影响。
difficult_points: Those architectures 回指前文所说的住宅、公寓及红瓦屋顶建筑。
are influenced by 是被动结构，指出这些建筑风格的影响来源。

sentences.sentence: Bondi Beach hosted the beach volleyball competition at the 2000 Summer Olympics.
sentences.translation: 邦迪海滩承办了2000年夏季奥运会的沙滩排球比赛。
difficult_points: hosted 是一般过去时，表示邦迪海滩作为比赛举办地。
at the 2000 Summer Olympics 说明沙滩排球比赛所属的赛事背景。

sentences.sentence: A temporary 10,000-seat stadium, a much smaller stadium, 2 warm-up courts, and 3 training courts were set up to host the tournament.
sentences.translation: 为承办这项赛事，当地搭建了一座临时的万人体育场、一座小得多的体育场、两个热身场和三个训练场。

structure.text: A temporary 10,000-seat stadium, a much smaller stadium, 2 warm-up courts, and 3 training courts

difficult_points: 主语由四类设施并列构成，因此被动谓语使用复数 were set up。
to host the tournament 是目的状语，说明搭建这些场馆的用途。

sentences.sentence: The Bondi Beach Volleyball Stadium was constructed for it and stood for just six weeks.
sentences.translation: 邦迪沙滩排球体育场为此而建，仅存在了六周。

structure.text: and stood for just six weeks

difficult_points: was constructed 是被动语态，it 回指前文的奥运沙滩排球赛事。
and 连接两个谓语，stood 在此表示该临时建筑存在或矗立的时长。

sentences.sentence: Campaigners oppose both the social and environmental consequences of the development.
sentences.translation: 活动人士反对这项开发所带来的社会和环境后果。

structure.text: both the social and environmental consequences of the development

difficult_points: both... and... 连接 social 与 environmental，强调两方面的后果。
of the development 后置限定 consequences，说明这些后果源于该开发项目。

sentences.sentence: The stadium will divide the beach in two and seriously restrict public access for swimming, walking, and other forms of outdoor recreation.
sentences.translation: 这座体育场会把海滩一分为二，并严重限制公众游泳、散步和从事其他户外休闲活动的空间。

structure.text: will divide the beach in two
for swimming, walking, and other forms of outdoor recreation

difficult_points: divide the beach in two 表示把海滩分成两部分。
divide 与 restrict 是共用 will 的并列谓语，for 短语列举公众进入海滩的活动目的。

sentences.sentence: People protest for their human rights of having a pure seaside and argue for health life in Bondi.
sentences.translation: 人们为享有纯净海滨的权利而抗议，并主张在邦迪拥有健康的生活。

structure.text: protest for their human rights of having a pure seaside
and argue for health life in Bondi

difficult_points: protest 与 argue 是共用主语 People 的并列谓语，分别表达抗议与主张。
of having... 说明 human rights 的具体内容；原文 health life 搭配不自然，语义指健康生活。

sentences.sentence: "They're prepared to risk lives and risk the Bondi beach environment for the sake of eight days of volleyball", said Stephen Uniacke, a construction lawyer involved in the campaign.
sentences.translation: 参与这场运动的建筑律师斯蒂芬·尤尼亚克说：“他们竟准备为了八天的排球比赛，拿生命和邦迪海滩的环境去冒险。”

structure.text: "They're prepared to risk lives and risk the Bondi beach environment for the sake of eight days of volleyball"
a construction lawyer involved in the campaign

difficult_points: be prepared to do 表示“准备好或甘愿做某事”，两个 risk 构成并列动作。
a construction lawyer... 是 Stephen Uniacke 的同位语，其中 involved... 是过去分词短语，说明他参与了这场运动。

sentences.sentence: Other environmental concerns include the possibility that soil dredged up from below the sand will acidify when brought to the surface.
sentences.translation: 其他环境担忧还包括这样一种可能：从沙层下挖出的土壤被带到地表后会发生酸化。

structure.text: the possibility that soil dredged up from below the sand will acidify when brought to the surface
that soil dredged up from below the sand will acidify when brought to the surface
dredged up from below the sand

difficult_points: that 引导同位语从句，具体说明 the possibility 的内容。
dredged up... 后置修饰 soil；when brought... 是省略了 soil is 的被动时间状语从句。
